back_translation: For the choirmaster. A psalm of David.
How long, O LORD? Will You forget me forever? How long will You hide Your face from me?
How long must I take counsel in my soul, with sorrow in my heart all day? How long will my enemy be exalted over me?
O LORD my God, consider and answer me; give light to my eyes, lest I sleep in death,
lest my enemy say, 'I have prevailed over him,' and my foes rejoice when I fall.
But I have trusted in Your steadfast love; my heart will rejoice in Your salvation. I will sing to the LORD, for He has dealt bountifully with me.
